headline: Zebra, Gartner, and TransUnion Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending oil prices soaring and triggering a broad risk-off move.

headline: mea Sets the Pace for Agentic AI in Insurance, Recognised Across 2026 Research and Awards
summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, July 08, 2026--mea Platform, the insurance-native agentic AI company, has earned recognition across independent 2026 insurance research and industry awards for its agentic AI, spanning Life, Property and Casualty (P&C), and Specialty insurance.

headline: Gartner (IT) Declines Amid Signs of Slowing Growth
summary: Artisan Partners, an investment management firm, issued its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund”. A copy of this letter is available for download here. In Q1 2026, the portfolio underperformed the benchmark Russell Midcap Value Index as the market favored momentum-driven stocks over quality factors. Some holdings faced company-specific setbacks and […]
